nasb.text: The prophet who prophesies of peace, when the word of the prophet comes to pass, then that prophet will be known as one whom the Lord has truly sent.”

esv.text: As for the prophet who prophesies peace, when the word of that prophet comes to pass, then it will be known that the Lord has truly sent the prophet.”

cnv.text: 但預言平安的先知，除非他的話應驗，人才會承認他確實是耶和華所差遣的先知。”

ccb.text: 至于那预言会有平安的先知，只有他的话应验了，才能证明他是耶和华派来的。”
